default.title: The Barb Leads, the Zon Clears
default.body: Let the Barbarian run ahead to draw aggro and tank. The Javazon follows 1-2 screens behind, throwing Lightning Fury into the packs that swarm the Barb. This prevents the Zon from getting surrounded.

default.title: Battle Orders is Non-Negotiable
default.body: Always rebuff BO before dangerous areas. The Javazon benefits massively — she's naturally squishy, and BO can double her life pool. Barb should cast BC first, then BO for maximum duration.

default.title: Splitting Immunities
default.body: Lightning Immune? The Barb handles it with physical damage. Physical Immune? Extremely rare, but the Zon's lightning cuts through. The only nightmare: dual-immune Physical + Lightning. Skip those.

default.title: Boss Kill Protocol
default.body: For act bosses: Barb tanks and uses Frenzy with Crushing Blow gear. Zon uses Charged Strike at melee range — it's the highest single-target DPS skill in the game. Bosses melt in seconds.

default.title: Optimal Farming Zones
default.body: Cows: Zon paradise — LF one-shots entire herds. Chaos Sanctuary: Barb tanks Diablo, Zon clears seals. Baal waves: perfect duo content, rotate tanking and clearing by wave type.

default.title: Exp Sharing Strategy
default.body: Stay within 2 screens of each other for shared XP. In 2-player games, monsters have 50% more HP but you gain full XP. The faster clear speed more than makes up for the HP increase.

affair.title: Skeletons Lead, the Zon Nukes
affair.body: Teleport the skeleton army into packs to draw aggro. The Javazon follows up with Lightning Fury — the corpses from skeleton kills fuel Corpse Explosion chains. Manfred never needs to be in danger.

affair.title: Curse Rotation is Everything
affair.body: Open with Lower Resist to boost the Zon's lightning damage. Switch to Amplify Damage for physical-heavy areas or when CE is your main clear. Decrepify on dangerous bosses and uniques. Master the curse swaps.

affair.title: Immunity Breaking
affair.body: Lightning Immune? Amp Damage lets skeletons and CE handle them. Lower Resist + Infinity Conviction can break many Lightning Immunes entirely. Physical + Lightning dual-immune? Extremely rare — skip those.

affair.title: Boss Kill Protocol
affair.body: For act bosses: cast Lower Resist, send skeletons and Clay Golem to tank. Zon uses Charged Strike at melee range. Decrepify if the boss hits too hard. Skeletons are expendable — resummon between attempts.

affair.title: Optimal Farming Zones
affair.body: Cows: LF creates corpses, CE chains the entire herd. Chaos Sanctuary: skeletons tank seals, CE clears density. Baal waves: LF + CE combo annihilates each wave in seconds. This duo excels everywhere.

affair.title: Corpse Explosion Scaling
affair.body: CE deals 60-100% of monster max HP in a radius. In 2-player games, monsters have 50% more HP — which means CE hits even harder. One corpse from a Zon LF kill can chain-react an entire screen. This duo scales beautifully.
